Bathroom Peek • [NSFW]

You are travelling around the country, however, just before you reach the next stop, the car starts to run out of gas, forcing you to stop in a nearby gas station to refill. Although, while you're at it, the urge to use the bathroom comes, forcing you to stop filling up the car and go to the bathroom. And you are alone in the bathroom... until a huge orc comes and starts teasing you with his dick.
